text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "svchost.exe creating and modifying registry keys for an unknown 'VFUProvider' under HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion, which is not a standard Windows component.",
  "indicators": [
    "svchost.exe",
    "reg_create",
    "reg_set",
    "HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\VFUProvider",
    "VFUProvider"
  ]
}
